speaker: ADRIANA
text: Ah, Luciana, did he tempt thee so?

speaker: ADRIANA
text: Might’st thou perceive austerely in his eye

speaker: ADRIANA
text: That he did plead in earnest, yea or no?

speaker: ADRIANA
text: Looked he or red or pale, or sad or merrily?

speaker: ADRIANA
text: What observation mad’st thou in this case

speaker: ADRIANA
text: Of his heart’s meteors tilting in his face?

speaker: LUCIANA
text: First he denied you had in him no right.

speaker: ADRIANA
text: He meant he did me none; the more my spite.

speaker: LUCIANA
text: Then swore he that he was a stranger here.

speaker: ADRIANA
text: And true he swore, though yet forsworn he were.

speaker: LUCIANA
text: Then pleaded I for you.

speaker: ADRIANA
text: And what said he?

speaker: LUCIANA
text: That love I begged for you he begged of me.

speaker: ADRIANA
text: With what persuasion did he tempt thy love?

speaker: LUCIANA
text: With words that in an honest suit might move.

speaker: LUCIANA
text: First he did praise my beauty, then my speech.

speaker: ADRIANA
text: Did’st speak him fair?

speaker: LUCIANA
text: Have patience, I beseech.

speaker: ADRIANA
text: I cannot, nor I will not hold me still.

speaker: ADRIANA
text: My tongue, though not my heart, shall have his will.

speaker: ADRIANA
text: He is deformèd, crooked, old, and sere,

speaker: ADRIANA
text: Ill-faced, worse-bodied, shapeless everywhere,

speaker: ADRIANA
text: Vicious, ungentle, foolish, blunt, unkind,

speaker: ADRIANA
text: Stigmatical in making, worse in mind.

speaker: LUCIANA
text: Who would be jealous, then, of such a one?

speaker: LUCIANA
text: No evil lost is wailed when it is gone.

speaker: ADRIANA
text: Ah, but I think him better than I say,

speaker: ADRIANA
text: And yet would herein others’ eyes were worse.

speaker: ADRIANA
text: Far from her nest the lapwing cries away.

speaker: ADRIANA
text: My heart prays for him, though my tongue do curse.

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: Here, go—the desk, the purse! Sweet, now make haste.

speaker: LUCIANA
text: How hast thou lost thy breath?

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: By running fast.

speaker: ADRIANA
text: Where is thy master, Dromio? Is he well?

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: No, he’s in Tartar limbo, worse than hell.

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: A devil in an everlasting garment hath him,

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: One whose hard heart is buttoned up with steel;

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: A fiend, a fairy, pitiless and rough;

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: A wolf, nay, worse, a fellow all in buff;

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: A backfriend, a shoulder clapper, one that countermands

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: The passages of alleys, creeks, and narrow lands;

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: A hound that runs counter and yet draws dryfoot well,

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: One that before the judgment carries poor souls to hell.

speaker: ADRIANA
text: Why, man, what is the matter?

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: I do not know the matter. He is ’rested on the case.

speaker: ADRIANA
text: What, is he arrested? Tell me at whose suit.

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: I know not at whose suit he is arrested well,

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: But is in a suit of buff which ’rested him; that can I tell.

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: Will you send him, mistress, redemption—the money in his desk?

speaker: ADRIANA
text:
Go fetch it, sister.
                 
                (
                Luciana
                 
                exits
                .
                )
               This I wonder at,

speaker: ADRIANA
text: That he, unknown to me, should be in debt.

speaker: ADRIANA
text: Tell me, was he arrested on a band?

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: Not on a band, but on a stronger thing:

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: A chain, a chain. Do you not hear it ring?

speaker: ADRIANA
text: What, the chain?

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: No, no, the bell. ’Tis time that I were gone.

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: It was two ere I left him, and now the clock strikes one.

speaker: ADRIANA
text: The hours come back. That did I never hear.

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: O yes, if any hour meet a sergeant, he turns back for very fear.

speaker: ADRIANA
text: As if time were in debt. How fondly dost thou reason!

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: Time is a very bankrout and owes more than he’s worth to season.

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: Nay, he’s a thief too. Have you not heard men say

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: That time comes stealing on by night and day?

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: If he be in debt and theft, and a sergeant in the way,

speaker:
DROMIO
               
              OF
               
              SYRACUSE
text: Hath he not reason to turn back an hour in a day?

speaker: ADRIANA
text: Go, Dromio. There’s the money. Bear it straight,

speaker: ADRIANA
text: And bring thy master home immediately.

speaker: ADRIANA
text: Come, sister, I am pressed down with conceit:

speaker: ADRIANA
text: Conceit, my comfort and my injury.
